profile_route.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-pass171-postprofile cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64|lu_1024x1024_f64|cholesky_1024x1024_f64|matmul_2d_1024x1024x1024_f64|pinv_256x128_f64|qr_1024x1024_f64|eig_48x48_f64)' --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --sample-size 10
profile_route.justification: GEMM2048 remained top but exact-order GEMM micro/layout families were in a rejection streak; selected the top structural non-GEMM Cholesky row.

lever.summary: Tested a 4-lane safe-Rust std::simd/register-blocked q-side lower-SYRK dot update for cholesky_schur_update_lower_rows.
lever.decision: rejected after same-worker regression; source restored

baseline.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1264463 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1264463 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR,RCH_WORKER,RCH_WORKERS rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-ea94k-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/cholesky_1024x1024_f64 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --sample-size 10

candidate.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1264463 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1264463 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR,RCH_WORKER,RCH_WORKERS rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-ea94k-candidate cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/cholesky_1024x1024_f64 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3 --sample-size 10

isomorphism_proof_before_rejection.ordering: Candidate preserved p row order, q output order, and c=0..jb accumulation order per lower-triangle entry.
isomorphism_proof_before_rejection.floating_point: Each lane accumulated dot += p_row[c] * q_row[c] in ascending c order; no reassociation across c was introduced.
isomorphism_proof_before_rejection.surface: Lower-only update surface, dtype, shape, error behavior, NaN/signed-zero propagation, and RNG absence were unchanged.

validation.name: focused Cholesky proof before rejection
validation.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-ea94k-proof cargo test -p fj-lax --lib cholesky -- --nocapture

next_primitive: Stop q-lane SYRK vectorization. Attack lower-packed Cholesky workspace / recursive lower-triangle storage to reduce full-matrix bandwidth and cache footprint while preserving public row-major L materialization.
